name: Confetti Vegetable Relish
recipeIngredient: 3 cups corn (freshly cooked, scraped from cob)
1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1/2 green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Use freshly cooked corn-on-the cob; scrape kernels from the cob to measure 3 cups.
2. Place the corn in a serving bowl; add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
Yield: about 3-1/2 cups.
